title: BEM-865 exact write check
objective:
Run script:
"""
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in lines
base = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if ok:
    marker = base / 'BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_OK_CONFIRMED.md'
    marker.write_text('# BEM-865 Claude write check\nStatus: PASS\nEvidence: exact Status line found in from_claude selftest mailbox.\n', encoding='utf-8')
else:
    marker = base / 'BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_NOT_CONFIRMED.md'
    marker.write_text('# BEM-865 Claude write check\nStatus: WRITE_NOT_CONFIRMED\nEvidence: exact Status line not found in from_claude selftest mailbox.\nNext: inspect actual Claude writer dispatch/consumer.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('Claude exact write check: ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'WRITE_NOT_CONFIRMED'))
"""
No issue comments.
